decisions.reasoning: Flutter Mane outspeeds and 2HKOs Tornadus-Therian with Moonblast. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Flutter Mane's STAB moves and can threaten it with Knock Off or U-turn.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, allowing me to remove a major offensive threat immediately regardless of the opponent's choice to stay in or switch.

Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the best choice to pressure Flutter Mane with Sucker Punch, as it resists Shadow Ball and can potentially pick up the KO on the weakened Flutter Mane.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, securing the knockout regardless of the opponent's move choice.

Calyrex-Ice is at 52% and will be KO'd by Urshifu's next two attacks while failing to secure a 3HKO. Switching to Tornadus-Therian provides a safe resist to Urshifu's STAB moves and maintains momentum.
Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike. Even if the opponent switches, Hurricane is a strong neutral move that punishes the switch-in, and I outspeed them regardless.
Tornadus-Therian is at 25% HP and will be OHKOed by Iron Hands' Wild Charge, so switching to a healthier teammate is necessary to preserve momentum.
Calyrex-Ice is at 6% HP and will be KO'd by any move from Iron Hands. Switching to Tornadus-Therian allows me to preserve the turn and potentially pivot or check the opponent with a resist.
Tornadus-Therian has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Kingambit is the best choice to handle Iron Hands due to its bulk and resistance to potential coverage moves.
Calyrex-Ice is at 6% HP and will be KO'd by any move from Iron Hands. Switching to Amoonguss provides a defensive pivot to absorb the hit and potentially threaten with Spore or resist future attacks.
